summary: Ran full backend pytest suite (15/15 passing, real OpenRouter/Claude extraction verified) plus end-to-end Playwright coverage of the Bounce dashboard (landing, login page, seeded-session dashboard, new-memory save with structured result, folder deploy modal with <context>, all sidebar tabs, Connect Extension code+copy, Settings with logout, Search with Enter). All acceptance criteria met.

ui_bugs.issue: At 1920x1080 the 'Save memory' button sits at y=1012 (bottom of screen). Playwright refused a native click because the button was 'outside of the viewport' after the slide-in animation; a JS .click() worked. On shorter screens the primary CTA can be partially clipped. Consider giving the panel content max-h and letting the sticky footer stay in view, or a smaller vertical padding.

issues: Search only fires on Enter key (no submit button, no debounce-on-type). Discoverability is low — a magnifying-glass submit button or debounced auto-search would be friendlier.

action_items: (Optional) Add a submit button or on-type debounce to Search so users don't have to guess that Enter runs the query.
(Optional) Fix SavePanel so the footer 'Save memory' CTA never lands below the fold on 1080p.
critical_code_review_comments: Dashboard.jsx is 504 lines and contains ~9 sub-views/components (Recent, Folders, Search, Deployments, Connect wrapper, Settings, SavePanel, DeployModal, StructuredBlock, MemoryCard). It approaches the 700-line threshold; splitting each view into its own file under /app/frontend/src/views/ would improve maintainability.
GET /api/folders sorts docs by created_at in Python after a full to_list(500). For large folder counts, do the sort in MongoDB (find(...).sort('created_at', 1)).
recent/search/list_folders all do to_list(2000) then Python sort — acceptable at MVP scale but should move to indexed cursor sorts.
OPENROUTER_API_KEY is committed in /app/backend/.env as a real credit-limited key — rotate before any public repo push.
test_credentials: No password auth. Test user + Mongo session seeded via /app/auth_testing.md. Token used in this run: test_session_1783612810453 (user_test1783612810453). Backend accepts it via 'Authorization: Bearer'; frontend picks it up from localStorage.bounce_token.
seed_data_creation: Seeded 1 user (test.user@example.com) + 5 default folders + 1 session via mongosh (see auth_testing.md snippet). Pytest fixture 'seeded' also self-seeds per-run and tears down.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend pytest lives at /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py (uses pymongo + REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL from frontend/.env). It self-seeds a user via a session fixture, so it runs standalone. Auth is Emergent Google (cannot OAuth in automation) + GitHub (env-gated, empty vars => 503). Use the mongosh snippet in /app/auth_testing.md to mint a session for UI tests, then localStorage.setItem('bounce_token', <token>) before visiting /dashboard. Search view requires Enter to submit. Chrome extension in /app/extension is out of scope for this environment.
rca of the issue: No blocking issues. Two minor UX observations documented above; both are stylistic and do not affect functional acceptance criteria.
